home.featured_desc: Our most beloved drinks crafted with love and quality ingredients
home.brand_desc: Mèo Trà was born from a double love – bubble tea and cats. Every cup is a story, every sip is a memory.
home.hero1_desc: Beverages crafted with fresh ingredients, delivering an unforgettable flavor experience.
home.hero2_desc: Exclusive drinks only at Mèo Trà. Secret flavors, unique experience.
home.news_desc: Stay updated with the latest news and stories from Mèo Trà
home.review1_comment: Best bubble tea I've ever had! The tapioca pearls are perfectly chewy and the milk is so creamy. Will definitely be back.
home.review2_comment: The café vibe is adorable and the staff are so friendly. The Japanese Matcha is absolutely top-notch.
home.review3_comment: Great value, fast service. Mèo Trà Special is my weekly go-to.

about.seo_desc: Mèo Trà – A story of love for bubble tea and cute cats. Discover our mission and values.
about.hero_desc: Mèo Trà was born from a love of bubble tea and adorable cats. We believe every sip of bubble tea is a moment of love.
about.values_subtitle: What we believe in and strive for every day
about.val1_desc: We use fresh ingredients imported directly from Taiwan and Japan.
about.val2_desc: Every bubble tea is carefully crafted by our experienced baristas.
about.val3_desc: We use paper straws and recyclable cups to protect our planet.
about.val4_desc: Mèo Trà is a gathering place for cat lovers and bubble tea enthusiasts.
about.mission_p1: To deliver high-quality bubble teas with special flavors, creating a friendly space where everyone can relax and enjoy.
about.mission_p2: We don't just sell bubble tea — we bring moments of happiness and connect the cat-loving community.

brand.seo_desc: The Mèo Trà brand story – from idea to reality, a journey of building a beloved bubble tea brand.
brand.title: The Mèo Trà Brand
brand.subtitle: Discover our journey from a small idea to a beloved bubble tea brand.
brand.story_p1: The idea for Mèo Trà came from a double passion — love for bubble tea and love for cats. Our founder, a lifelong cat lover, realized both bring warmth, comfort, and happiness.
brand.story_p2: The logo of a cat holding a bubble tea cup became the symbol of this perfect combination, bringing a smile to every customer who visits.
brand.color_desc: Soft pink — the color of sweetness and gentleness, representing the love and warmth of Mèo Trà.
brand.font_desc: Be Vietnam Pro – a modern, approachable font that matches Mèo Trà's youthful and friendly personality.
brand.logo_desc: A single-stroke cat with a boba cup — simple, recognizable, and reflective of the brand spirit.

history.seo_desc: Mèo Trà's development journey from 2022 to the present.
history.title: Our History
history.subtitle: The journey of building Mèo Trà from a small idea to a beloved brand.
history.m1_desc: The founder conceived the idea of combining two loves: cats and bubble tea, after adopting a cat named Boba.
history.m2_desc: Mèo Trà officially opened in District 3, Ho Chi Minh City with a special 15-item menu.
history.m3_desc: Just 5 months in, Mèo Trà had already served over 10,000 happy customers.
history.m4_desc: Mèo Trà expanded to District 7 and Binh Thanh to meet growing demand.
history.m5_desc: The Mèo Trà app launched, enabling online ordering, point accumulation, and order tracking.
history.m6_desc: Mèo Trà was honored as the most beloved bubble tea brand in Ho Chi Minh City.

partners.seo_desc: Mèo Trà's strategic partners in delivering the highest quality bubble tea.
partners.title: Partners
partners.subtitle: We are proud to work with reputable partners in our journey to deliver the best quality.
partners.p1_desc: Direct supplier of premium Oolong, Jasmine, and black tea straight from Taiwan.
partners.p2_desc: International-standard fresh milk with traceable origins and guaranteed quality.
partners.p3_desc: Premium matcha from Uji, Kyoto – Japan's most renowned tea-growing region.
partners.p4_desc: Eco-friendly packaging partner providing paper straws and biodegradable cups.
partners.p5_desc: Fast 30-minute delivery service ensuring your bubble tea arrives fresh and delicious.
partners.p6_desc: Mèo Trà partners with a cat rescue shelter — 1% of monthly revenue is donated.
partners.become_desc: Do you have a product or service that aligns with Mèo Trà's values? Get in touch with us!
